text.tspan: RULE: receive message with HLC (m_phys, m_logical)
if A causes B, HLC(A) < HLC(B)
|HLC.phys - true wall_clock| u2264 NTP_clock_skew + small bounded drift
3. Monotonic non-decreasing across receives and crashes
4. Small overhead: a few bits of logical counter on top of normal timestamp
u2022 best estimate of wall-clock time (NTP-synced)
u2022 advances forward as real time passes
u2022 NEVER goes backward (clamp if wall clock jumps)
u2022 increments when physical can't advance
u2022 captures causal order within same millisecond
u2022 resets to 0 when physical_ms moves forward
